name: native-builds
description: Build & run iOS / macOS / iPadOS Xcode projects from the VS Code status bar with scheme + device pickers and a play/stop button.

commands.title: Native Builds: Run on Selected Device
Native Builds: Refresh Project / Schemes / Devices

nativeBuilds.quiet.description: Pass -quiet to xcodebuild so the output channel shows only warnings, errors, and the final result. Disable for full build logs.

enumDescriptions: Never open the output panel automatically (use the status bar / 'Show Build Output' command).
Only open the output panel when a build fails.
Open the output panel on every build/run.
nativeBuilds.revealOutput.description: When to automatically reveal the Native Builds output panel.

nativeBuilds.outputFilter.description: Optional regular expression. When set, only build output lines matching it are shown (e.g. "error:|warning:|BUILD SUCCEEDED|BUILD FAILED"). Applied on top of -quiet. Leave empty to show all (already-quieted) output.

nativeBuilds.additionalBuildArgs.description: Extra arguments appended to every xcodebuild invocation (e.g. ["-configuration", "Debug", "CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO"]).

nativeBuilds.includeAllSimulators.description: Include watchOS / tvOS / visionOS simulators in the device picker. When false, only iOS/iPadOS simulators plus My Mac are listed.
